steps.title: In a 1
steps.instruction: In a 1.5ml tube, homogenize _________mg of dry fecal matter in 700ul of QIAzol

steps.title: Add 140ul of chloroform, MIX WELL...
steps.instruction: Add 140ul of chloroform, MIX WELL and let incubate for 1 min at 20C, MIX AGAIN, and incubate for 3 min

steps.title: Recover flow through , and add 0
steps.instruction: Recover flow through , and add 0.65x volumes for 100% Et-OH

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase and determine volume...
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase and determine volume by pipetting, combine with 1x Volume of 70% Et-OH .

steps.title: Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin...
steps.instruction: Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin Column" at >8,000xg at 20C

steps.title: Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin...
steps.instruction: Run through a "RNeasy Mini spin Column" at >8,000xg at 20C, 700ul at a time discarding flow-through

steps.title: Wash matrix with 500 ul of RPE
steps.instruction: Wash matrix with 500 ul of RPE

steps.title: Wash matrix ______x with ice cold 90% Et-OH
steps.instruction: Wash matrix ______x with ice cold 90% Et-OH

steps.title: Dry Tube by spinning column for 5 min
steps.instruction: Dry Tube by spinning column for 5 min

steps.instruction: ______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.9 = _____________ml 100% Et-OH ______num samples \cdot 0.55 \cdot 0.1 = _____________ml Molecular Grade Water
